case_title: BARBONI, RICHARD et al vs. BIVINS, ELSIE MAE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBONI, RICHARD TURPIN, ROLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT BIVINS, ELSIE MAE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

JUDGE CONWAY, JPOND, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 2:40 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. RON BOCHNER APPEARING FOR PLTF. AND DEFT ELSIE MAE BIVINS PRESENT AND APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTFS AND AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 225 HYDE STREET #312, SF, CA. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 5:00 PM 1/9/97. PLTF. SHALL RECOVER ZERO RENTS/DAMAGES, ZERO ATTYS FEES AND ZERO COSTS. DEPOSITS WAIVED BY DEFT. PLTF. SUBMITTED A JUDGMENT TO COURT SIGNED AND APPROVED BY DEFT AS TO FORM AND CONTENT. DEFT.
